title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: See the Olympic medal count for the 2026 Winter Games
items.description: Here is a look at where the medal count stands for Team USA and other nations as the competition heats up at the 2026 Winter Olympics.

items.title: Ben Ogden becomes 1st U.S. man in 50 years to medal in cross-country
items.description: Ben Ogden of Team USA won the silver medal in the cross-country sprint Tuesday at the Winter Olympics in Italy.

items.title: ‘We hold these truths': Viewing the Declaration of Independence, visitors reflect on America at 250
WATCH:  California surfer swept out to sea survives by clinging to lobster trap buoy
items.description: A rescue team swam out and brought him back to shore after he was spotted by drone a quarter of a mile off shore.

items.title: How much gold is in an Olympic gold medal, and how much is it worth?
items.description: Olympic medals have what's known as a "melt value." But they're worth far more financially than their mineral contents, an auction expert notes.

items.title: WATCH:  Small plane makes emergency landing on busy intersection in Georgia
items.description: The plane hit three vehicles, but remarkably no one was severely hurt during the incident.

items.title: Trump’s immigration chiefs are set to testify in Congress following protester deaths
items.description: The heads of agencies enforcing President Donald Trump’s immigration agenda are set to testify before Congress.

items.title: WATCH:  Seahawks meet a mouse at Disneyland
items.description: Fresh off their Super Bowl win, a couple of players from the Seahawks take part in a 40-year-old tradition at Disneyland.

items.title: 'Democrats are on offense': House Dems' campaign arm adds 5 seats to target list
items.description: The DCCC said its targeting seats in Minnesota, Colorado and elsewhere.

items.title: Judge rejects Trump administration's effort to obtain Michigan voter data
items.description: The Trump administration has filed lawsuits against 24 states in an effort to obtain their voter rolls.
